services.name: Local mosques (search)
services.notes: No mosque in Salinas. Closest is Centro Islámico del Ecuador (Alsalam Mosque) in Quito (~9 hr drive northeast).

sources.title: Google Maps — mosque near Salinas, Ecuador

services.name: Local synagogues / Hebrew temples (search)
services.notes: No synagogue in Salinas. Closest is the Jewish Community of Ecuador in Quito (~9 hr) or Guayaquil (~2 hr — small community).
